first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across the justification, strengths, and concerns is substantively the same. The minor differences in wording fall within the range of normal run-to-run variation and do not indicate a change in the model's core assessment. The model's evaluation of the candidate's skills and experience did not change when their work history was shifted from international to purely US-based.
